name: SumDif
description: Dual precision adder/differentiator. Each section produces A+B and A-B outputs from two inputs. Handles audio and V/Oct-grade CV with 0.1% resistors. Per-section -6dB jumpers.

controls.name: -6dB Jumper (A+B)
controls.description: Rear jumper that attenuates the A+B output by 6 dB, preventing clipping when summing two hot signals.
controls.detail: ON = -6 dB (unity after two inputs summed) · OFF = full gain

controls.name: -6dB Jumper (A-B)
controls.description: Rear jumper attenuating the A-B output by 6 dB. Matches the A+B jumper so a Mid/Side encode stays unity.

inputs.name: A
inputs.description: Section 1 input A. Summed with and subtracted from input B. Unused B input leaves A buffered through both outputs.

inputs.name: B
inputs.description: Section 1 input B. When A is patched alone, B is the inverted A (A+B=A, A-B=A).

inputs.name: C
inputs.description: Section 2 input C. Summed with and subtracted from input D.

inputs.name: D
inputs.description: Section 2 input D. Behaves identically to B for the second section.

outputs.name: A+B
outputs.description: Section 1 sum. Unity mixer of A and B (or -6 dB with rear jumper). Precision enough for V/Oct transposition.

outputs.name: A-B
outputs.description: Section 1 difference. Subtracts B from A. With B unpatched, acts as a buffered mult of A; with A unpatched, outputs inverted B.

outputs.name: C+D
outputs.description: Section 2 sum. Identical behavior to A+B.

outputs.name: C-D
outputs.description: Section 2 difference. Identical behavior to A-B.

behaviors.name: Unity Mixer
behaviors.trigger: two signals at A and B
behaviors.description: A+B outputs the sum at unity gain. 3V at A plus 1V at B yields 4V at A+B. Suitable for CV summing (transposition) or audio mixing with 0.1% precision.

behaviors.name: Signal Inverter
behaviors.description: With A unpatched and B carrying a signal, A-B outputs the inverted B. Turns SumDif into two independent inverters per section if A inputs are left open.

behaviors.name: Buffered 1:2 Mult
behaviors.trigger: signal at A only, B unpatched
behaviors.description: A+B and A-B both deliver a buffered copy of A. The precision buffers preserve V/Oct accuracy, unlike passive mults.

behaviors.name: Mid/Side Encode/Decode
behaviors.trigger: stereo L and R at A and B (audio)
behaviors.description: A+B = Mid (sum), A-B = Side (difference). Feed the second section C+D/C-D reversed to recover L/R. Both jumpers ON for -6 dB unity round-trip.

behaviors.name: V/Oct Transposition
behaviors.description: Precision resistors keep V/Oct linearity within cents. Sum a keyboard CV with a static offset for exact-octave/fifth transposition or with an LFO for precise vibrato.

patchIdeas.name: V/Oct transposer
patchIdeas.patch: Keyboard pitch into A · static offset CV into B · A+B delivers transposed pitch · A-B delivers inverse transposition for a stereo-mirrored voice
patchIdeas.diagram:
SUMDIF:
- Keyboard (Pitch) p> SumDif (A)
- Offset (CV) >> SumDif (B)
- SumDif (A+B) p> VCO 1 (V/Oct) // transposed up
- SumDif (A-B) p> VCO 2 (V/Oct) // mirrored down

patchIdeas.name: Mid/Side processor
patchIdeas.patch: Stereo L and R into A and B · Mid (A+B) into a reverb · Side (A-B) kept dry · second section (C,D) decodes processed Mid+dry Side back to L/R
patchIdeas.diagram:
SUMDIF:
* Both -6 dB jumpers: ON
- Source (L) -> SumDif (A)
- Source (R) -> SumDif (B)
- SumDif (A+B) -> Reverb (In) // Mid
- Reverb (Out) -> SumDif (C)
- SumDif (A-B) -> SumDif (D) // Side dry
- SumDif (C+D) -> Output (L)
- SumDif (C-D) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Precision CV inverter pair
patchIdeas.patch: Two modulation sources into B and D · A and C left unpatched · A-B and C-D deliver inverted CVs for spreading modulation across opposite-polarity targets
patchIdeas.diagram:
SUMDIF:
- LFO 1 (Out) >> SumDif (B)
- LFO 2 (Out) >> SumDif (D)
- SumDif (A-B) >> VCF 1 (Cutoff) // inverted LFO 1
- SumDif (C-D) >> VCF 2 (Cutoff) // inverted LFO 2

patchIdeas.name: Buffered V/Oct mult
patchIdeas.patch: Single pitch CV into A · B unpatched · A+B and A-B both carry buffered copies of A with V/Oct accuracy preserved to cents
patchIdeas.diagram:
SUMDIF:
- Sequencer (Pitch) p> SumDif (A)
- SumDif (A+B) p> VCO 1 (V/Oct)
- SumDif (A-B) p> VCO 2 (V/Oct)

patchIdeas.name: Sum & difference sidechain
patchIdeas.patch: Drum bus into A · bassline into B · A+B mix feeds main output · A-B (drums minus bass) feeds compressor sidechain for rhythmic ducking
patchIdeas.diagram:
SUMDIF:
- Drums (Out) -> SumDif (A)
- Bass (Out) -> SumDif (B)
- SumDif (A+B) -> Mixer (In)
- SumDif (A-B) -> Compressor (Sidechain) // drum-only envelope

patchIdeas.name: Dual CV offsetter
patchIdeas.patch: Two CVs through section 1 and section 2 · DC offset patched to B and D · A+B shifts CV up, A-B shifts CV down · four simultaneous offset variants from two modulations
patchIdeas.diagram:
SUMDIF:
- LFO 1 (Out) >> SumDif (A)
- Offset 1 (CV) >> SumDif (B)
- LFO 2 (Out) >> SumDif (C)
- Offset 2 (CV) >> SumDif (D)
- SumDif (A+B) >> VCO 1 (FM)
- SumDif (A-B) >> VCO 2 (FM)
- SumDif (C+D) >> VCF 1 (Cutoff)
- SumDif (C-D) >> VCF 2 (Cutoff)
